questions.question: Describe the key differences between virtualization of clusters and virtualization of data centers, in terms of scalability, management complexity, and performance. (10 marks)
What are the primary benefits of using hardware-assisted virtualization, and how does it enhance the security of virtualized environments? (10 marks)
Explain the concept of 'live migration' in virtualization, and describe a scenario where this technique is particularly useful. (5 marks)
